name: dev.unity2foxglove.ros2forunity
description: Optional ROS2 For Unity adapter package for Unity2Foxglove. Provides facade, source-only adapter sample, docs, and diagnostics while runtime binaries live in separate runtime packages and release artifacts.

samples.description: Imports a source-only adapter sample that connects the Unity2Foxglove ROS2 facade to a ROS2 For Unity runtime package or external runtime.
Imports a source-only ROS2 For Unity sample that publishes /tf and /scan for RViz2 acceptance.
Imports a source-only ROS2 For Unity sample that publishes generic Unity2Foxglove point-cloud frames as sensor_msgs/msg/PointCloud2 on /points.
Imports a source-only ROS2 For Unity sample that publishes cube scene markers as visualization_msgs/msg/MarkerArray on /markers.
